message:
feat(api): stateful fleet lease management and verifier conformance-check storage

fleet_control_routes:
- Add FleetLeaseState with in-memory lease store (BTreeMap + capacity limit)
- Lease lifecycle: acquire, renew, release, sweep expired
- Fencing token generation for distributed coordination safety
- Sequence counters for leases, fencing tokens, and coordination operations
- Coordination target validation with idempotency checks

verifier_routes:
- Add VerifierRouteState with stored conformance checks and audit log
- Evidence artifact retrieval by check_id with content hash verification
- Audit log query with sequence-based ordering and capacity limits
- Bounded storage with MAX_STORED_CONFORMANCE_CHECKS and
  MAX_VERIFIER_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRIES constants
- Saturating sequence counters for check IDs and audit entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
